//: Dev-mode Rojo project — for tight-loop SDK iteration without rebuilding the plugin every time.
//1: Usage: `rojo serve Roculus_Bridge/dev.project.json` from the repo root, then click Connect in
//2: the Rojo Studio plugin. Edits to runtime/src/* now stream into ServerScriptService.RoculusBridge
//3: live. F5 to playtest with the latest code. No Studio restart, no plugin rebuild.
//7: 2. Replace TOKEN_GOES_HERE with a real Bridge token (mint at /settings/integrations/bridge)
//8: 3. Adjust apiBase if you're not on http://localhost:8888
//9: 4. The .local file is gitignored so your dev token never gets committed.
name: RoculusBridgeDev
